residualRisks: The merged AdsCatalog layer now depends on the primitive renderer contracts, so later type or markup changes should update both layers together.
result.summary: Merged the low-level Ads primitive exports with the higher-level AdsCatalog layer in a single module, kept both story entry styles available, and rewired MockupPreviews to stay on the shared catalog-driven AdsSurface.
